title: erigeron obtusus
intro: Erigeron obtusus, also known as Fleabane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron obtusus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from minor wounds and skin irritations. Erigeron obtusus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
